overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, showcasing illuminated glass skyscrapers, neon corporate signage, and dense urban architecture rendered in a high-end game engine.

agents.ego_description: slowly flying forward through the city canyon between high-rise buildings, maintaining steady altitude while approaching the central tower

entered.detail: large cyan neon corporate sign with white lettering mounted on the side of a dark skyscraper
tall modern skyscraper with horizontal illuminated window strips and dark glass facade dominating the center view
cluster of high-rise buildings with scattered lit windows forming the left boundary of the urban canyon
lower concrete building facade with illuminated windows in the foreground on the right

segments.scene_description: A continuous aerial drone flight through a cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera moves slowly forward between illuminated glass skyscrapers, with a prominent cyan neon corporate sign visible on the right side. The central tower dominates the view with its grid of warm lit windows against the dark glass facade, while the perspective gradually shifts as the drone advances through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drone flight through a dense cyberpunk cityscape that gradually reveals the scale of its towering architecture. It begins by gliding slowly forward between illuminated glass skyscrapers, where a prominent cyan neon corporate sign glows on the right. As the camera advances through the urban canyon, the perspective shifts to emphasize a central tower dominated by a grid of warm lit windows. The scene then expands as the drone pushes deeper into the cityscape, contrasting the dark glass facades with the vibrant artificial lights of the surrounding metropolis.
